title: Workshop: Build an Emergency Shelter Registration Form
summary: Workshop: Build an Emergency Shelter Registration Form retrieves prior skills in an original multi-step shelter intake across touch keyboard and autofill scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css form inheritance, css form layout, css form focus, css form errors, css form native custom, css form autofill motion in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real multi-step shelter intake across touch keyboard and autofill artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
